recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.

recommendations.title: Isle of Dogs
recommendations.overview: In the future, an outbreak of canine flu leads the mayor of a Japanese city to banish all dogs to an island used as a garbage dump. The outcasts must soon embark on an epic journey when a 12-year-old boy arrives on the island to find his beloved pet.

recommendations.title: Cats & Dogs 3: Paws Unite
recommendations.overview: It's been ten years since the creation of the Great Truce, an elaborate joint-species surveillance system designed and monitored by cats and dogs to keep the peace when conflicts arise. But when a tech-savvy villain hacks into wireless networks to us

recommendations.title: The Incredible Journey
recommendations.overview: The story of three pets, a cat and two dogs, who lose their owners when they are all on vacation. Can they find their way home?

recommendations.title: Cats & Dogs: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
recommendations.overview: The ongoing war between the canine and feline species is put on hold when they join forces to thwart a rogue cat spy with her own sinister plans for conquest.

recommendations.title: Dreamgirls
recommendations.overview: Parallel love stories of three young women in Berlin: Hannah - an unhappy attorney who sexually demeans herself in order to get at least some love and romance, Leni who runs a coffee shop and has just been ditched by her long term boyfriend, and Vivi

recommendations.title: Balto III: Wings of Change
recommendations.overview: Balto and the other sled dogs are feeling dejected because the mail that used to be delivered by dogsled is now being delivered by airplanes. But when a mail plane crashes in the mountains, the dogs come to the rescue.

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: A New Generation
recommendations.overview: Equestria's divided. But a bright-eyed hero believes Earth Ponies, Pegasi and Unicorns should be pals — and, hoof to heart, she’s determined to prove it.

recommendations.title: Top Cat Begins
recommendations.overview: Top Cat and his new feline friend hatch a scheme to steal from the fearful Mr. Big.

recommendations.title: Duck Duck Goose
recommendations.overview: After he’s grounded by an injury, a high-flying bachelor is saddled with two wide-eyed orphans as they come face-to-face with the dangers and beauty of the outside world.
